# X (Obsidian numbered-prefix template — EXCLUDED)

This note lives under `90_Templates/` — the Obsidian numbered-prefix build-dir
form, EXCLUDED from the scan set via SCAN_EXCLUDE_RE.fullmatch. It carries a
broken wikilink AND a C6-bloat index row that WOULD flag if scanned (the
`type: index` frontmatter makes it C6-eligible), but the numbered-prefix
exclusion skips it. The wikilink resolution index (all_md) stays whole-vault.

[[no-such-numbered-template-target]]
